title: The most Epic Evangelion moment
wikitext:
[]: The most Epic Evangelion moment             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Wed Jul 12, 2006 3:59 am Which moment in Eva made you feel that this show truly was a work an art, gave you a 'wow!' feeling. Wow as in shocked or positive, not 'wow!' as in repulsed or frightened. For me, it was when Shougouki burst out of Lilith-Rei's eye in EoE and let out her famous roar, and all consequent scenes of Instrumentality being inturrupted.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 12, 2006 4:15 am The whole battle between Eva02 and the Eva series! Just awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:18 am hell yeah! the whole eva series battle was kick arse, but i think the zeruel episode was brilliant aswell especially the unit 01 punching zeruel through a wall part. priceless. still gives me goosebumps.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:20 am Tough to say... But the entire scene in episode 25 (in Final Genesis, not EoE) where Shinji is sitting on the chair in the middle of what appears to be an auditorium and characters appear randomly saying things to him. Just thinking about that scene makes me giddy... ...Alas, I haven't seen any Evangelion episodes since February.

[]:             Quote Post by Hau Ruck » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:56 am Not sure about most epic but first thing that came in my mind is a very cool moment when EVA-01 goes berserk and rips that black & white circle-shaped angel(can't remember the name) from inside. EDIT: It was also cool when Dummy plug-controlled Eva-01 beats the hell out of Angel that invaded Touji's Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryousanki King » Wed Jul 12, 2006 9:16 am Epic? Every single battle in the damn series. Masterpieces of combat.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 12, 2006 9:47 am Ryousanki King wrote: Epic? Every single battle in the damn series. Masterpieces of combat.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Wed Jul 12, 2006 10:01 am It has to be when Eva-00 charges at Zeruel with the N^2 Bomb and the AT Field spreads across the Geofront. That scene is wonderfully epic. [edit] The End of Evangelion is all pretty epic. Whenever I watch, it always installs this "I can't believe it was all leading up to this" feeling in me. It just seems so surreal and upsetting an ending, even for Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Wed Jul 12, 2006 10:41 am The most epic parts would have to be the 3rd angel battle, the 14th angel battle and the fight between the Eva series vs Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 12, 2006 10:46 am Yui and Shinji's goodbye scene made it clear that he'd leanred something from all of this. Even if " One more final, I need you " Said he's still got problems of the major kind

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Wed Jul 12, 2006 10:50 am the_seventh_child wrote: The whole battle between Eva02 and the Eva series! Just awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Wed Jul 12, 2006 2:48 pm my wow moment would be the fight against Zeruel where Eva unit 01 goes berserker

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jul 12, 2006 2:53 pm Eva 1 poping out of lelie ;) it was just so cool!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 12, 2006 3:17 pm Taking down Ramiel. Especially Rei doing her self-sacrifical bit.

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Wed Jul 12, 2006 3:24 pm when the JSSDF forces invaded NERV headquarters. this doesn't come up often, but it's safe to say that nerv was PWNED.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 12, 2006 4:22 pm Hand of God wrote: my wow moment would be the fight against Zeruel where Eva unit 01 goes berserker

[]:             Quote Post by Hau Ruck » Wed Jul 12, 2006 4:28 pm the_seventh_child wrote: The whole battle between Eva02 and the Eva series! Just awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 13, 2006 7:47 am Every battle in Evangelion were :shock: good, but I was all sweat when I saw Unit-01 burst out of Leliel's "body" and when the same EVA consumed one of the Angels (can't recall which one). Mwhahahahaaa! :twisted: :twisted: :twisted: I remember when I watched the last mentioned scene, I hoped that there'll be at least one great slaughter in the movie with Unit-01... and it actually happened, though with Unit-02...

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Jul 13, 2006 9:46 am Easily when Unit 01/Shinji is holding Kaworu, and waits about a minute before popping his head off. The near-silence and stillness builds up tension like none of the flashy action proceeding it could.

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:36 pm Well... the whole Third Impact was just... wow :shock: Every time I see it, I get a goose skin. ^^ The battle against the Eva series was also awesome. Somehow I must laugh every time Asuka (tries) to speak German. Especially when Shinji and Asuka are in EVA-02 Ok, I think if I ask a Japanese something with my little Japanese knowledge he would probably answer "No English" or something like that xD

For me, it was when Shougouki burst out of Lilith-Rei's eye in EoE and let out her famous roar, and all consequent scenes of Instrumentality be
